title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 57.452 - St. Louis City, sheriffs exempt from certification requirements
text:
57.452.  St. Louis City, sheriffs exempt from certification requirements. — The provisions of section 590.180 shall not apply to any elected or appointed sheriff of a* city not within a county.
(L. 1989 S.B. 196 § 57.447) 
Effective 5-25-89 
*Word "a" does not appear in original rolls.
